chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 48 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.459/2026 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of protective bail 09.02.2026 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- In this protective bail, no one is present for the applicant. So was the case on the earlier date. Matter stands dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
